note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left heel wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 4 pressure ulcer Left heel measures 7.8 cm x 4.0 cm x 3.7 cm.
  Wound bed: 28% slough, 72% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Stage 4 pressure ulcer Left heel — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Nutritional consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Left heel / Measures 7.8 cm x 4.0 cm / Stage: Stage 4
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. Odor present. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
